description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style knife with a pronounced forward curve and a single-edged blade. The blade is broad and features several circular cutouts, likely for weight reduction and aesthetic appeal. The handle is ergonomically contoured, with a visible finger guard and a textured grip for secure handling. The entire object appears to be constructed from a dark, metallic material, possibly coated steel or a high-strength alloy, giving it a sleek, matte-black finish. The knife lacks any visible ornamentation or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and durability. No sheath or scabbard is present with the object.
description: A modern, curved tactical knife with a broad, single-edged blade featuring cutouts and a contoured, textured handle in matte black.
description_view_0: The knife is shown at an angle highlighting the curved blade, cutouts, and ergonomic handle.
description_view_1: A side profile view displays the full length of the blade, the cutouts, and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: The handle is most prominent, showing its contoured grip and the lack of a guard or pommel detail.
description_view_3: A top-down view emphasizes the blade's curvature and the overall slim profile of the knife.
attribute_blade_type: curved, single-edged, tactical with weight-reducing cutouts
attribute_handle_design: contoured, textured, polymer grip with finger guard
